---
title: "TxMineFlow Report"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
library(duckdb)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

# Gunakan path absolut dengan mode read_only
db_path <- "/home/nanda/projects/txmineflow/results/warehouse/txmineflow.duckdb"
con <- dbConnect(duckdb(), db_path, read_only = TRUE)
de_results <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM differential_expression")
dbDisconnect(con)
```

## Analisis Differensial Ekspresi

Ini adalah tabel gen yang signifikan:

```{r}
de_results %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

## Visualisasi Volcano Plot

```{r}
plot_ly(de_results, x = ~log2FoldChange, y = ~(-log10(pvalue)),
        type = 'scatter', mode = 'markers',
        hoverinfo = 'text', text = ~gene) %>%
  layout(title = "Volcano Plot", xaxis = list(title = "Log2 Fold Change"), yaxis = list(title = "-Log10 P-value"))
```
